titleZh: 2024 年生效的中国公司法重大修订
titleEn: Substantively Revised PRC Company Law Will Enter into Effect on 1 July 2024
abstractZh: 从实务角度梳理 2023 年修法后在 2024 年落地的主要制度变化，尤其适合与注册资本、董事义务和治理结构专题联读。
abstractEn: A practitioner-focused walkthrough of the 2023 revision as it came into force in 2024, especially useful on capital timing and director duties.
